mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social.content_i18n ( content_id, locale, title, summary, body, is_machine_translated, translated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{contentId}::uuid, #{locale}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{body}, #{isMachineTranslated}, #{translatedAt}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (content_id, locale) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, body = EXCLUDED.body, is_machine_translated = EXCLUDED.is_machine_translated, translated_at = EXCLUDED.translated_at, updated_at = NOW()
